configureModelTier(string,uint32,uint32,.notice: Configure hardware requirements for a model tier.

distributePayment(uint64).notice: Distribute payment proportionally by GPU-minutes after job completion.

joinTraining(uint64).notice: Operator joins an active training job.

leaveTraining(uint64).notice: Operator leaves a training job gracefully.

onRegister(address,bytes).notice: Register operator capabilities. Called during Blueprint onRegister.

slashOperator(uint64,address,string).notice: Slash an operator for misbehavior (called by verification).

submitCheckpoint(uint64,bytes32,uint32).notice: Submit a checkpoint hash after a sync round.

updateContribution(uint64,address,uint64.notice: Update operator contribution metrics (called by heartbeat processor).
